arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho 'starting rumours' about Celtic as killer Rodgers quip gets radio pundits pondering the ultimate 'what if'
arts.sum: Mourinho and Rodgers have a history and their recent back-and-forth got people talking

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Hibs LIVE as David Gray looks for double over Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: It's set to be a ding-dong between two of the best in the country with a return trip to Hampden on the line

arts.ttl: Arsenal 6th, Celtic 17th - Which European clubs made the most from kit sales?
arts.sum: Football clubs typically gauge their success in the sport by the number of games and trophies that they’ve won in any given time period, but in the modern game many turn to economic figures...

arts.ttl: Celtic's 'true leader' talked up by international teammate
arts.sum: Cameron Carter-Vickers, Luis Palma and Alistair Johnston have also all represented the USA, Canada and Honduras over the past season or two whilst at the Celtic Park club. But it seems that it’s Johnston who is setting the heather on fire for Canada as international teammate, and Hibs star, Junior Hoilett, points out before today’s big Scottish Cup tie.

arts.ttl: Jason Cundy says Jose Mourinho is 'starting little rumours' about Brendan Rodgers' Celtic
arts.sum: But Jason Cundy thinks Mourinho is merely starting ‘little rumours’ with his comments and he has done this before, when the England job was available before Thomas Tuchel was appointed. But, whilst Celtic dominate again in Scotland, there will be a time when the current man in the dugout does depart and a certain Jose Mourinho has made some interesting comments of late.

arts.ttl: Lennon Miller latest as Premier League twist appears in £5m move for Celtic target
arts.sum: Miller has been linked with a Parkhead move ever since Brendan Rodgers returned to the club, with the Celtic manager still receiving reports on the young Motherwell starlet. Celtic face Premier League competition for Lennon Miller but with a twist

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain sent Celtic reminder after Champions League heartache against Liverpool
arts.sum: John Hartson’s Celtic reminder to PSG as Anfield and Liverpool test awaits in the Champions League After Brendan Rodgers’ side bowed out of the playoff stages, the first legs of the round of 16 games took place on Tuesday and Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Celtic 'keen' to sign Scottish Championship midfield duo
arts.sum: Celtic are reportedly keen to sign highly-rated Airdrieonians duo Cole and Dylan Williams.

arts.ttl: Jeffrey Schlupp to make Celtic spot his own as Hoops go hunting for Hibs revenge – Scottish Cup squad revealed
arts.sum: The Hoops are out for revenge against Hibs as they look to seal a Scottish Cup semi-final place

arts.ttl: Alan Stubbs names current Celtic star he would have loved to play alongside, dubbed 'the best'
arts.sum: The last time Hibs won the Scottish Cup was in 2015-16 when Stubbs was in the dugout, as the former centre-back also represented Celtic for a five-year period. Cameron Carter-Vickers has been the best defender in Scotland for several years now, so it’s no surprise that Stubbs picked the American as the man he would have loved to have played alongside.
